items.h: AEW Dynamite viewership up & 18-49 rating down for Forbidden Door fallout show
items.p: This past Wednesday’s AEW Dynamite averaged 634,000 viewers on TBS, up 2.9% from the previous week. It’s the second largest audience for the show since June 3rd. Dynamite averaged a 0.09 rating in...
